_activity_matrix_description: Regulon activity matrix (features in rows, samples/cells in columns). Supports .Rds or tab-separated .txt/.tsv.
_annotation_description: Cell/sample state annotation. Supports .Rds (character vector) or single-column .txt/.tsv.
_background_classes_description: Classes to use as background in discriminant analysis. Null uses all classes in annotation.
_query_classes_description: Classes to analyze as query. Null uses all classes in annotation.
_k_range_description: Clustering resolution (k) values to explore. Two-element [min, max] expands to every integer from min through max (inclusive). Longer arrays are used as an explicit list of k values.
_seed_description: Random seed for reproducible AUCell rankings and background subsampling in discriminant analysis.
_generate_plots_description: When true (default), save GDS barplot and modulon heatmap PDFs to Results/.
_state_order_description: Optional column order for the heatmap (cell states). Null uses order of first appearance in the annotation.
